_README: Add this plugin entry to app.json 'plugins' array when switching to a native dev build. Do NOT add it while using Expo Go — it will crash Metro.
_STEPS: 1. Run: npx expo install react-native-google-mobile-ads expo-dev-client
2. Replace the placeholder IDs below with your real AdMob App IDs
3. Copy the 'plugin' array entry below into app.json plugins
